content.full_text:
June 9, 1992

Fair Political Practices Committee
428 J Street, #800
PO Box 807
Sacramento, CA 95812

To whom it may concern:

I am considering a petition drive in our city. In addition to the normal requirements of obtaining signatures and so forth, I wish to know what the reporting requirements are for such an organization. More specifically does that organization have to file reports with the City Clerk showing contributors to the campaign, expenses and other data much the same as an official campaign organization would have to do?

Any information you can send to me on this subject would be greatly appreciated.

Sincerely,

Clarence J. Turner
